candidates.why: Separate operating D&A row, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales-related and appears to be part of a broader depreciation disclosure rather than a COGS-specific amount.
Operating amortization row above EBIT, but not identified as relating to COGS and likely a component of the broader depreciation/amortisation line.
Balancing/component-style row with unclear scope; not explicitly tied to COGS and unsuitable for separate addition to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is only 'Raw materials and consumables'. The excerpt shows only company-level operating D&A lines, not COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation. Adding any of these to COGS would risk misallocation and double counting.

candidates.why: Separate operating depreciation row at the same general level as the selected overhead rows, but it is not labelled as SG&A/admin/overhead-specific, so it cannot be cleanly assigned to XSGA_COMPONENTS only.
Operating amortization row above EBIT, but not identified as SG&A-related and likely a component within the broader D&A disclosure rather than a standalone SG&A-only amount.
Unclear balancing/component row with no SG&A-specific wording; not appropriate to add separately to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Other external costs', 'Employee benefit xpenses', and 'Other operating expenses'. No explicit SG&A-specific D&A row is shown, and XRD is empty, so there is no clear basis to extract a separate XSGA-only D&A amount from the operating section without risking double counting or functional misclassification.
